name: The Scorched Spiral
subtitle: What the fire left behind is still burning
theme: Endurance / Buried truths / What survives destruction

shard.name: Seal Fragment of Earth
shard.description: A cracked amber crystal threaded with heat. It smells of ash and something older — the memory of solid ground before it broke.

scenes.narration: The Oracle's third marker leads into the Ember Wastes — a scorched basin where Valdris's influence burned everything that once grew. The air shimmers with unnatural heat.
Tao pauses at the edge of the wastes, looking out over the blackened expanse with something close to professional interest.

dialogue.speaker: Tao
dialogue.text: Everything here is already dead. Thoroughly. I would be impressed if I were not also concerned.

dialogue.speaker: Lulu
dialogue.text: Something lives here still. I can feel it — like a heartbeat made of heat. Restless. Old.

dialogue.speaker: Tao
dialogue.text: ...A living thing in a dead place. That is either inspiring or a warning. Possibly both.

scenes.narration: Rei stands still at the centre of the path, head tilted — reading the air the way others read a map.

dialogue.speaker: Rei
dialogue.text: The Dark Phoenix. Ancient. It was a creature of renewal once — fire that destroys so that something new can grow. Valdris twisted that. Turned rebirth into an endless loop of burning.

dialogue.speaker: Aya
dialogue.text: A creature whose purpose was corrupted into its opposite. That has a particular kind of cruelty to it.

dialogue.speaker: Tao
dialogue.text: Yes. And it is very much on fire. Let us have a plan.

chapters.title: Into the Scorched Spiral
chapters.map_hint: Cross the Ember Wastes — the drowned coast and the Kraken lie beyond the scorched spiral.

pre_dialogue.speaker: narrator
pre_dialogue.text: The Ember Wastes stretch ahead — a scarred landscape where even the rock burns. Shadow-corrupted creatures stalk between the cinders, drawn inward by something vast and restless at the centre.

pre_dialogue.speaker: Rei
pre_dialogue.text: The Dark Phoenix's karmic weight grows stronger ahead. We are close. Do not let the heat slow you.

pre_dialogue.speaker: Tao
pre_dialogue.text: Hot, dangerous, and full of things that want us dead. Perfectly normal Tuesday. Move.

post_dialogue.speaker: narrator
post_dialogue.text: The spiral path opens into a crater of black stone and dying flame. At its center, something vast circles — wings of shadow and fire, a shape that was once a creature of rebirth.

post_dialogue.speaker: Rei
post_dialogue.text: The Dark Phoenix. It burned here long before the shadow found it. The corruption only fed what was already restless.

post_dialogue.speaker: Tao
post_dialogue.text: A creature that cannot stop burning. I understand that feeling more than I would like.

post_dialogue.speaker: Aya
post_dialogue.text: Then we give it rest. That is what we came to do.

pre_dialogue.speaker: narrator
pre_dialogue.text: At the heart of the Ember Wastes, the Dark Phoenix circles — a creature of impossible fire, its wings trailing shadow and ash. The Seal Fragment pulses at its core like a second heartbeat.

pre_dialogue.speaker: Rei
pre_dialogue.text: It was not always like this. Something sacred was twisted here. The shadow took a creature of renewal and made it a creature of ending.

pre_dialogue.speaker: Tao
pre_dialogue.text: The fire does not scare me. The sorrow behind it does. Let us end this.

pre_dialogue.speaker: Aya
pre_dialogue.text: Together. We bring it peace the only way left to us.

post_dialogue.speaker: narrator
post_dialogue.text: The Dark Phoenix falls. As its flames gutter and go quiet, the Earth Seal Fragment rises from the ash — amber-warm, cracked through with old heat.

post_dialogue.speaker: Rei
post_dialogue.text: The karma lifts. It burned so long it forgot what it was. Now it can stop.

post_dialogue.speaker: Tao
post_dialogue.text: Three down. One more before we reach the depths. I find myself grateful for this team.

post_dialogue.speaker: Aya
post_dialogue.text: So do I. Whatever waits in the sunken temple — we face it the same way we faced this. Together.

dialogue.text: As the ash settles, a figure descends from above — a dragoon knight, his armor scorched at the edges but his lance glowing bright with aerial energy. He lands before them without a sound.

dialogue.speaker: Drake
dialogue.text: I am Drake, Dragoon of the Sky. I have been circling this wasteland for longer than I can account for. The moment the Phoenix fell — something in me unclenched. A chain I had forgotten was there.

dialogue.speaker: Ria
dialogue.text: A dragoon. I have heard of them — warriors who fight between earth and sky. What bound you here?

dialogue.speaker: Drake
dialogue.text: A curse I could not name. I only knew I could not leave. Now, feeling it shatter — I can move again. I would move with you, if you will have me.

dialogue.speaker: Rei
dialogue.text: A warrior chained by oaths not of their choosing, freed by the breaking of chains elsewhere. I understand that more than most.

dialogue.speaker: Aya
dialogue.text: Then stand with us. Not by curse — by choice.

dialogue.speaker: Drake
dialogue.text: My lance answers to a new oath now. The oath to see this darkness end.
